channel.title: 一言 on Mackenia 的小站
channel.description: Recent content in 一言 on Mackenia 的小站

item.title: 一言收藏
item.description: @font-face { font-family: ‘csWb’; src: url(“https://mackenia.xyz/陈尚文标准钢笔行书.ttf”); } @font-face { font-family: 'dkJs'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/雕刻旧时光.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'rmJz'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/瑞美加张清平硬笔行书.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'myJc'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa梅雨煎茶.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'xhWl'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa星河万里请指教.ttf"); } @font-face { font-family: 'yhHr'; src: url("https://mackenia.xyz/Aa银河绘日云月呢喃.ttf"); } #hitokoto { position: relative; } .left { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; } .word { font-size: 2.3rem; text-align: center; line-height: 50px; word-break: normal; margin: 0; padding: 15px 50px; font-family: 'rmJz'; } .
